version_pin_rationale: xdg-desktop-portal 1.14.4-1ubuntu2~22.04.2 is the jammy security-pocket build. Framework portal daemon that forwards screenshot/screencast/openfile requests from sandboxed Wayland clients to compositor-specific backends. SHIPPED BUT NOT ENABLED BY DE-H1: the daemon's hard `Depends: libpipewire-0.3-0` would crash it at socket activation, and the PoC compositor (sway) doesn't need the portal. DE-H1 plants the binaries + systemd user units (DISABLED) for DEM-tier readiness. Future DE-G1 / DE-K1 milestones flip the units on once PipeWire is added to the closure. The /usr/share/dbus-1/services/ activation files are planted but the daemon won't actually start at runtime until the unit is enabled.
